untranslatable_reason: Signal requires: (1) 52-week high proximity calculation — Donchian upper approximates but is not true 52-week high; (2) 52-week low avoidance buffer — no 252-day lookback available; (3) >30% drawdown detection with 5+ day uptrend confirmation — requires historical peak tracking and multi-day consecutive condition logic not supported; (4) 10-day ROC momentum calculation — returns indicator available but ROC(10) specifically not in allowed list. Partial translation uses available proxies (Donchian for strength, returns for momentum) but loses signal fidelity on recovery drawdown rules.
translation_notes: Entry approximates 'near 52-week high' using dc_upper (Donchian upper band, typically 20-day). Entry uses 10-day positive returns as proxy for 10-day ROC > 0%. Exit uses 2-consecutive-day close below SMA approximated as single condition close < sma_50, and momentum reversal approximated as returns < -5%. Stop loss set to 5% per avoid_low_buffer_percent. Cannot properly implement 52-week lookback, recovery from >30% drawdown, or 5+ day uptrend confirmation with available indicators.
